title: Eliminate Email Triage Interactive Auth Popups
summary: Migrated hourly email triage scheduled task from delegated interactive Graph auth to app-only certificate-based auth using the existing 'daily-priority-briefing-graph' Entra app registration. Eliminated Windows Terminal and Microsoft account picker popups.
keyOutcomes: Root cause identified: delegated Connect-MgGraph in hourly scheduled task triggered interactive auth UI
Reused existing 'daily-priority-briefing-graph' app (already had Mail.ReadWrite app permissions + cert credential)
Script refactored to app-only certificate auth with categorized exit codes (0/10/20/30/40/50/99)
Scheduled task hardened: Hidden=true, -WindowStyle Hidden, auth type guard
Dry-run verified: AppOnly auth succeeds, exit code 0, no interactive prompts
Runbook created with verification commands, cert rotation, incident triage, and rollback procedures
risks: Certificate expires March 2029 — rotation needed before then
Task runs under InteractiveToken principal — requires user to be logged in for cert store access
If certificate removed from user cert store, task fails with exit code 10
dependencies: Mailbox API compatibility validation for app permissions
validationCriteria: No popup windows during multi-run validation window
Scheduled task returns successful run results

validationResults.nextScheduledValidation: Monitor 2PM and 3PM runs on 2026-04-25 for continued AppOnly confirmation
